description_long: This is a modern, expansive house set within a large, walled property featuring a central swimming pool, multiple outdoor lounging areas, and landscaped sections with trees and greenery. The main building has a flat roof, large glass windows, and a multi-level design, with a prominent terrace overlooking the pool. The property includes a spacious patio, a separate recreational area with outdoor furniture, and a dedicated section that appears to be a sports or play area. The house is surrounded by paved walkways and open spaces, with several entry points and a clear division between private and communal zones. The exterior materials suggest a combination of concrete, glass, and metal, with some wooden accents in the outdoor areas. The overall layout is open and luxurious, designed for both relaxation and entertainment.
description: A large, modern house with a flat roof, central pool, and multiple outdoor living spaces, surrounded by landscaped grounds and paved walkways. The design features extensive glass, concrete, and metal elements, emphasizing luxury and openness.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from an angle highlighting the pool, terrace, and main building, with landscaped areas and outdoor seating visible.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a direct view of the pool and patio, with the main house and recreational area in the background, emphasizing the open layout.
description_view_2: View 2 focuses on the landscaped garden, outdoor furniture, and the rear of the house, showing the separation between living and recreational spaces.
description_view_3: View 3 highlights the side of the house, the terrace, and the entry to the recreational area, with trees and open space in the foreground.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide door, steps, and a covered porch with minimalistic columns and glass accents.
